name: useStateHistory
description: Hook that manages state with history functionality
examples: const { value, history, index, set, back, forward, reset, undo, redo, canUndo, canRedo } = useStateHistory(0);

parameters.name: initialValue
parameters.description: - The initial value to start the history with

source.source: * @param {Value} initialValue - The initial value to start the history with

tokens.name: initialValue
tokens.description: - The initial value to start the history with

parameters.name: capacity
parameters.description: - Maximum number of history entries and undo actions to keep

source.source: * @param {number} [capacity=10] - Maximum number of history entries and undo actions to keep

tokens.name: [capacity=10]
tokens.description: - Maximum number of history entries and undo actions to keep

returns.name: Object
returns.description: containing current value, history array and control methods

source.source: * @returns {UseStateHistoryReturn<Value>} Object containing current value, history array and control methods

tokens.description: containing current value, history array and control methods
